seed_instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 14 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain at least 21 sentences.

    *   *Sentence 2:* Spend the afternoon exploring the historic Alcatraz Island and the vibrant streets of Fisherman's Wharf.
    *   *Sentence 3:* Drive south along the scenic Highway 1, covering approximately 150 miles to the Big Sur coastline.

    1. Start your journey in San Francisco, where you can walk across the iconic Golden Gate Bridge.
    2. Spend the afternoon exploring the historic Alcatraz Island and the vibrant streets of Fisherman's Wharf.
    3. Drive south along the scenic Highway 1, covering approximately 150 miles to the Big Sur coastline.
    4. On day two, hike through the towering redwood forests and enjoy the dramatic ocean views.
    5. Continue your drive to Los Angeles, which is about 300 miles away from the coast.
    6. Spend your third day enjoying the beaches of Santa Monica and the glamour of the Hollywood Walk of Fame.
    7. On day four, head inland to Joshua Tree National Park, a drive of roughly 130 miles.
    8. Explore the unique rock formations and desert landscapes while searching for hidden cacti.
    9. Drive about 120 miles to the neon lights of Las Vegas for your fifth day of adventure.
    10. Experience the world-famous Las Vegas Strip and catch a spectacular evening show.
    11. On day six, travel 270 miles to the breathtaking Grand Canyon National Park.
    12. Take in the vast vistas from Mather Point and hike a portion of the Bright Angel Trail.
    13. Drive another 100 miles to Zion National Park to conclude your seventh day.
    14. Finish your trip by hiking the scenic Narrows or viewing the towering sandstone cliffs.
    15. This itinerary covers a diverse range of landscapes from the Pacific Ocean to the desert.
    16. You will experience the best of California, Nevada, and Arizona in one week.
    17. Make sure to pack plenty of water and sunscreen for the desert segments.
    18. Renting a convertible is a great way to enjoy the coastal drives.
    19. Be sure to book your national park entries and hotels well in advance.
    20. This road trip offers a perfect blend of city life and natural wonders.
    21. Enjoy your incredible journey across the beautiful American West Coast!
